shop.name: Digitalyze
shop.languages: We reply in English and Bahasa Malaysia.

policies.shipping: We ship our products via shopee chat
policies.shipping_fee: There are no shipping fee for our products
policies.payment: All payments go through Shopee's secure checkout. We accept ShopeePay, online banking (FPX), credit and debit cards, and cash on delivery (COD) where available.
policies.warranty: Selected products carry a 1-month seller warranty against defects. The warranty period is stated on each product listing.
policies.stock: If a product shows as available on our Shopee page, it is in stock. Stock updates in real time on Shopee, so the listing is always the source of truth.

faq.q: How will I receive my digital product?
faq.a: Once your payment is confirmed, we will send the file, download link, or access code directly to your Shopee Chat.
Orders are typically processed and sent within 5 to 15 minutes during our operating hours (10am to 12am).

faq.q: Do I need to pay for shipping?
faq.a: No, there are zero shipping fees since all items are delivered virtually.
Yes! If you encounter any issues downloading or setting up your digital product, just drop us a message in Shopee Chat.
Yes, all our digital products, software, and guides are 100% legitimate and functioning.

products.name: Steam Points (1000 pts)
products.description: Customize your Steam profile with avatars, backgrounds & chat effects. 1 unit = 1000 points (min. 10 units), sent to your own Steam account.

products.name: Valorant Ranked Account (APAC)
products.description: Full-access APAC ranked account, Platinum or higher with high MMR. Change email, password & security settings. Latest act, instant delivery, with a 30-day replacement or refund.

products.name: Valorant Unban Service
products.description: Professional appeal service to help recover your banned Valorant account. Custom-written appeal letters, all regions supported, high success rate. Message us before ordering to confirm eligibility.

products.name: Terraria (Official Steam Game)
products.description: The official Terraria game, sent to your Steam account as a gift. Full lifetime ownership, multiplayer ready, instant delivery during office hours. 100% genuine.
